mainEntity.name: Are mental health conditions occupational illnesses in West Jordan?
mainEntity.text: Are mental health conditions occupational illnesses in West Jordan?

acceptedAnswer.text: Utah recognizes PTSD or stress disorders as occupational illnesses if directly resulting from extraordinary work events, proven by medical evidence.[5]

suggestedAnswer.text: Cumulative stress rarely qualifies; need specific trauma. West Jordan first responders succeed with peer-reviewed psych reports. Insurers deny 'ordinary' stress; Cottonwood Heights attorneys battle via vocational psych evals.[5]

name: Mental Occupational Illness in West Jordan
description: Utah recognizes PTSD or stress disorders as occupational illnesses if directly resulting from extraordinary work events, proven by medical evidence.[5]
